name: voiceflow-whisper-issai
_notes: Container disk 150GB: model (1.5GB) + ISSAI (21GB) + checkpoints (~6GB) + workspace
SECURE cloud zorunlu — COMMUNITY'de HuggingFace download yavaş/kesilir
H100 80GB: batch=16 rahat, ~4-5 saat 3 epoch ISSAI 164K pair
Pod silinince volume KALIR, /workspace içeriği korunur
